name: Red Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Diced baked tofu or firm tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped tomatoes, cubed red potatoes, diced red onions, olive oil, basil, parsley, oregano, water, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
4. Cover with foil or a lid.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Serve 2 servings.
